name: Danny Cook
title: COO
quote: Tory Bryant is a servant leader and prayer warrior who coaches the hearts and minds of everyone he's around — and he does it with the kind of selfless conviction that only comes from a life genuinely surrendered to God. I've served alongside him on and off the court and watched him pray boldly over strangers, pour into young men and women, and share his experience, strength, and hope in ways that move people — and any business leader looking to be equipped and emboldened to advance the Kingdom in the marketplace would be well-served following his lead.
